pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project would compile against Java 17 APIs, potentially missing new language features or causing compatibility issues when running on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add a new property java.version set to 21 to standardize the Java version configuration.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace explicit cast after instanceof check with pattern matching variable declaration.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.after:
if (response instanceof SyntHttpResponse httpResponse) {
            this.synthResponse = httpResponse;

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() to adopt Java 21 collection API.
Replace deprecated List.add(int index, E element) with List.addFirst(E element) for adding to the head of a list.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: List.add(int, E) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used on List implementations that support the Deque interface, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int index) with List.getFirst() for retrieving the first element.
src/main/java/dev/nishisan/operation/inv.why_exists: List.get(0) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used on List implementations that support the Deque interface, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.
